title: Define v5.0 actor skill packet contract
description: Define the canonical actor skill packet contract for TASK-048. The contract must state objective, assigned actor or role, required skills, capability-fit evidence, resource refs, policy refs, expected output contract, review criteria, blocker semantics, and Human Recognition Interface projection fields.
triage_notes: Completed TASK-049: actor skill packet contract is defined in docs/v5-actor-skill-packet-contract.md and schemas/aof-actor-skill-packet.schema.json, with regression coverage for valid packets, extra fields, and missing required skill evidence.
